mapper.sql: id, name, code, type, parent_id, order_num, status, description, create_time, update_time
mapper.select: SELECT FROM department WHERE status = 1 ORDER BY order_num, id
SELECT FROM department WHERE type = #{type} AND status = 1 ORDER BY order_num, id
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO department (name, code, type, parent_id, order_num, status, description) VALUES (#{name}, #{code}, #{type}, #{parentId}, #{orderNum}, #{status}, #{description})
mapper.delete: UPDATE department SET status = 0 WHERE id = #{id}
